steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage is centered on a single contrast: how Teresa usually falls asleep (quickly, violently) versus how she fell asleep last night (slowly, willingly, like moonlight inviting you into a receding tide).

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice A identifies exactly what the passage covers: Teresa's awakening and a detailed contrast of how she fell asleep last night versus her usual sleep. The other choices misidentify or overstate peripheral details—none address the passage's central contrast of sleep patterns. That matches choice A — A is correct.
